name: levante-audio-dashboard
description: Web-based audio dashboard for Levante translations

scripts.export:partner-itembank: bash -lc 'cd .. && source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true; python3 utilities/partner_itembank_export.py --db-path tmp/itembank_by_task_regen.sqlite --output tmp/partner_itembank_audio_dashboard.json'
scripts.export:partner-itembank:upload: bash -lc 'cd .. && source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null || true; python3 utilities/partner_itembank_export.py --db-path tmp/itembank_by_task_regen.sqlite --output tmp/partner_itembank_audio_dashboard.json --upload-gcs'

author: Levante Team
